resume.name: Celestin Mande Mande
resume.title: Professional Summary
resume.summary: I am a detail-oriented and highly accurate professional with strong experience in administrative support, student services, data processing, and information management. I am skilled in entering, validating, and organizing large volumes of data with exceptional attention to detail. Adept at working with digital tools, spreadsheets, insurance portals, and content management systems. Known for strong communication skills, professionalism, and the ability to follow instructions while meeting strict deadlines. I bring experience from educational administration, data review, and analytics environments.

responsibilities: Entered student data into Excel Workbooks and institutional systems with precision
Collaborate with student support teams to resolve discrepancies or missing information
Documented student interactions and academic decisions with clarity and precision
Reviewed, validated, and input metadata with high precision
Communicated with projects leads to resolve inconsistencies or missing data
Manage large data sets while maintaining speed and accuracy
Designed and built an interactive Power BI dashboard from raw datasets to visualize key performance metrics and trends.
Integrated multiple data sources using Power Query and SQL for efficient data transformation
Manage large data sets while maintaining speed and accuracy
Entered and maintained school-wide records, grades, attendance, and student information
Collected, structured, analyzed data for school reporting.
